ddls:
CREATE TABLE "champions" (
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion */,
  "champion_name" TEXT /* Name of the champion */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played with the champion */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills achieved */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths incurred */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  "kda_ratio" REAL /* Kill/Death/Assist ratio */,
  "avg_minions" REAL /* Average minions killed per game */,
  "winrate" REAL /* Win rate percentage */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the champion */,
  "champion_type" TEXT /* Type of champion (e.g., marksman, fighter) */,
  "attack_type" TEXT /* Attack type of the champion (e.g., melee, ranged) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the champion (e.g., easy, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the game */,
  "total_playtime" REAL /* Total playtime in hours */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who participated in the game */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion used in the game */,
  "game_duration" REAL /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  "queue_type" TEXT /* Queue type (e.g., solo, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_records" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session associated with this record */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total kills achieved in this match */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths incurred in this match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists in this match */,
  "minions_killed" INTEGER /* Total minions killed in this match */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Total gold earned in this match */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt in this match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_records_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion used */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player with this champion */,
  "total_kills" INTEGER /* Total kills by the player with this champion */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths by the player with this champion */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player with this champion */,
  "average_kda" REAL /* Average KDA ratio of the player with this champion */,
  "winrate" REAL /* Win rate of the player with this champion */,
  "most_played_role" TEXT /* Most played role by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "queue_size" INTEGER /* Queue size for this game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance change record */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion affected by the balance change */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Game patch version during which changes were made */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "date_of_change" TEXT /* Date the changes were implemented */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., buff, nerf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_balances_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Jungler, Support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., Marksman, Fighter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_roles" (
  "champion_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion-role assignment */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the champion */,
  "role_fit" TEXT /* How well the champion fits this role (e.g., good, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_roles_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the feedback */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchmaking" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchmaking record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player matched in the game */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win/Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchmaking_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchmaking_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patches" (
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patch */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Version of the patch */,
  "patch_date" TEXT /* Date the patch was released */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes in the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patch_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance change record */,
  "patch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patch that introduced the balance change */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion affected by the balance change */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Details of the balance change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_balances_patch_id FOREIGN KEY ("patch_id") REFERENCES patches ("patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patch_balances_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "server_location" TEXT /* Location of the server */,
  "server_status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_servers" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-server association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the player is associated with */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_servers_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_servers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., kill, death, objective taken) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion that has this skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_damage" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_skills_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)
